name: Vulnerable Driver Loaded
notes:
This rule triggers when a vulnerable driver is loaded.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Michael Haag, Splunk
SIGMA Title: Windows Vulnerable Driver Loaded
SIGMA Description: The following analytic utilizes a known list of vulnerable Windows drivers to help defenders find potential persistence or privelege escalation via a vulnerable driver.


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001843) Driver loaded, (5001844) Image loaded
when any of SHA256 Hash (custom), MD5 Hash (custom) are contained in any of Vulnerable Drivers_Hashes - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY Vulnerable Driver Loaded on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001843) Driver loaded, (5001844) Image loaded
AND when any of SHA256 Hash (custom), MD5 Hash (custom) are contained in any of Vulnerable Drivers_Hashes - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
RED_list: Event description: Detects vulnerable driver being loaded
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
